zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ogle vp於1331年之後出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Robert de Ogle8693歲，母親Joan de Hepple8689歲。他於大約1350年與Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1355年11月6日在英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆爾 米德爾 華爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ogle vp于1331年之后出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Robert de Ogle8693岁，母亲Joan de Hepple8689岁。他于大约1350年与Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1355年11月6日在英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆爾 米德爾 華爾特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ogle vp was born after 1331, in Northumberland, England, his father, Robert de Ogle, was 8693 and his mother, Joan de Hepple, was 8689. He married Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall about 1350, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 6 November 1355, in Berwick, Northumberland, England, and was buried in Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ogle vp est né après 1331, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ogle, avait 8693 ans et sa mère, Joan de Hepple, avait 8689 ans. Il a épousé Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall environ 1350, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1355, à Berwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ogle vp nach 1331 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ogle 8693 und seine Mutter Joan de Hepple 8689. Er hat um 1350 in Northumberland, England Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 6. November 1355 in Berwick, Northumberland, England und wurde in Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ogle vp è nato il dopo il 1331 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ogle, aveva 8693 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Hepple, aveva 8689 anni. Lui sposato Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall circa 1350, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 novembre 1355, nel Berwick, Northumberland, England, e fu sepolto a Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ogle vpが1331年以後にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Ogleは8693歳，母Joan de Heppleは8689歳であった。約1350年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでHelen Bertram Baroness of Bothallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1355年11月6日にイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィックで死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムシュアイア ミッドル クアルターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ogle vp(이)가 1331년 이후 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ogle(은)는 8693세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Hepple(은)는 8689세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1355년 11월 6일 영국 노르스벌랜드 버윅에서 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함실르 미들일 퀄르터에 묻혔다.

mn.Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberla: Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Norðhymbra land, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ogle vp nasceu após 1331, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ogle, tinha 8693 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Hepple, tinha 8689 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall aproximadamente 1350, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1355, em Berwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ogle vp родился после 1331 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ogle было 8693 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Hepple, 8689. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall около 1350 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 6 ноября 1355 г. в местности бирвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия и был похоронен в местности хексхамшир миддл куартир, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ogle vp nació después de 1331, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ogle, tenía 8693 años y su mamá, Joan de Hepple, tenía 8689 años. Se casó con Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall aproximadamente 1350, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1355, en Berwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Hexhamshire Middle Quarter, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
